summary: Stores and emits a string control value.
description: Use String for labels, symbolic control values, and text payloads that should move through the graph as data.
runtimeBehavior: in updates and emits, set updates silently, and bang emits the stored string without changing it.

ports.description: Updates the stored text and emits it.
Updates the stored text without emitting.
Emits the current stored text without changing it.

params.description: Optional typed channel name updated whenever this object emits.
Optional typed channel name used to receive routed updates.

example.title: Store text as data
example.description: Use String when text should behave like a stored value, not a one-shot message.
